mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT member_id) FROM checkin WHERE DATE(checkin_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM checkin WHERE status = 'CHECKED_IN' AND checkout_time IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM checkin WHERE YEARWEEK(checkin_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1)

SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT r.member_id) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE (COUNT(DISTINCT c.member_id) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT r.member_id)) END AS checkin_rate FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN checkin c ON r.member_id = c.member_id AND r.course_id = c.course_id AND DATE(c.checkin_time) = DATE(r.reservation_time) WHERE r.course_id = #{courseId} AND r.status = 'APPROVED' AND r.payment_status = 'PAID'

SELECT m.id AS member_id, m.name AS member_name, m.phone AS member_phone, m.level AS member_level, m.avatar AS member_avatar, COUNT(c.id) AS checkin_count FROM member m LEFT JOIN checkin c ON m.id = c.member_id GROUP BY m.id, m.name, m.phone, m.level, m.avatar ORDER BY checkin_count DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(checkin_time)) FROM ( SELECT checkin_time, DATE_SUB(DATE(checkin_time), INTERVAL (a.rn - 1) DAY) AS group_date FROM ( SELECT checkin_time, @row := @row + 1 AS rn FROM checkin, (SELECT @row := 0) AS t WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND type = 'GYM' ORDER BY checkin_time DESC ) AS a ) AS b WHERE group_date = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM checkin WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND YEAR(checkin_time) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(checkin_time) = MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM checkin WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND YEARWEEK(checkin_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1)
